title: Control
drDigitalIntro:
Control helps you run shortcut commands.
• You hold it together with another key.
• It's the main shortcut key on Windows.
• Holding it while clicking often opens a menu of extra options.
drDigitalSuccess: That's Control — a shortcut helper on every kind of computer!
drDigitalHint: Find Control (Ctrl) in the bottom corner of the keyboard, then click Continue.
